name: Templates
description: Reusable, structured-data templates: a JSON Schema plus optional AI-assist config (stored preference only, no AI engine), categories, tags, and public sharing. Ships a /templates page (site_templates, routed by the site-routing convention -- see docs/site-routing.md) listing the signed-in owner's templates with create/edit via the generic schema-driven form (window.dbbasicForm) and list (window.dbbasicList), the same pattern as /tasks in app-tasks.
